entries.definition: past participle of fly — to have moved through the air, travelled by aircraft, or moved swiftly
entries.exampleSentence: She has flown to over 30 countries for work in the past five years.

entries.definition: overly elaborate, pompous, or pretentious in style (especially in the compound 'high-flown')
entries.exampleSentence: His high-flown speech about honour impressed no one in the audience.
